title: Meet the candidates: Questionnaire for Holmes Beach Mayor
summary: Leading up to the 2026 Florida primary (August 19) and general election (November 3), Tampa Bay 28 contacted qualified candidates for Holmes Beach Mayor.

title: Man shot in leg in St. Petersburg, police investigating
summary: A man was shot in the leg in St. Petersburg on Monday, and detectives are investigating what led to the shooting after the victim suffered injuries that were not considered life-threatening.

title: 'It's either eat or pay bills': Florida families desperate for answers after losing SNAP benefits to fraud
summary: Tampa Bay area mothers say scammers drained their SNAP cards — with fraudulent charges traced to the same California address — and Florida offers no path to reimbursement.

title: Deputies seek suspects in Davenport retail theft and battery

title: Man accused of killing girlfriend after stabbing her 65 times; State Attorney’s Office seeks death penalty
summary: A former MacDill Air Force Base data analyst could face the death penalty after prosecutors say he brutally stabbed his girlfriend 65 times inside his Tampa home on June 19.

title: Scallop season brings millions of dollars to Pasco County's economy
summary: Scallop season is more than a summertime tradition along Pasco County's Gulf Coast. It's also a significant economic driver that brings tens of thousands of visitors.

title: VIDEO: Yacht smashes into dock along New River in Fort Lauderdale
summary: A yacht dubbed the "Determination" was being towed when it collided with the dock along New River in Fort Lauderdale on Monday.

title: Trump says Netanyahu won't face arrest if he visits NYC, downplaying Mamdani's threat
summary: President Trump is pushing back on New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's threat to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu during a planned visit to New York in September.

title: Emergency wastewater repairs to close lanes on Bayshore Boulevard in Tampa
summary: A large cave-in above a wastewater mainline will close two lanes on Bayshore Boulevard in Tampa beginning Tuesday, affecting traffic between Brorein Street and Platt Street.

title: Trump orders 10th consecutive night of strikes on Iran in push to reopen Strait of Hormuz
summary: President Donald Trump has ordered a 10th consecutive night of U.S. strikes on Iran as the conflict over the Strait of Hormuz continues to escalate.

title: Trump imposes 50% tariff on Canadian goods, citing disputes over autos, alcohol
summary: President Donald Trump on Monday imposed 50% tariffs on most Canadian goods, declaring that Canada has unfairly discriminated against American autos, alcohol and dairy products.

title: How Tampa General's Aeromed helicopter gets critical patients to the hospital faster than an ambulance
